AI.title: LLMs are stuck in a groupthink groove. This startup is trying to get them out.
AI.summary: Let’s start with a game. Open up your chatbot of choice—Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini—and type “Give me a random number between 1 and 10.” You’re going to get 7. Almost always. Now type “Another” and you’ll get 3 or 4. Type “Another” again and you’ll get 8 or 9. That won’t work every time—but if it…

AI.title: Google built a great smart speaker, but Gemini isn’t ready for it
AI.summary: Smart speakers have spent the past few years searching for a compelling second act. Beyond music, timers, and controlling your lights, they've struggled to justify taking up space on the kitchen counter. AI promised to change that. AI.title: Goose, a New Gay Dating App, Appears to Be a Psyop
AI.summary: Touted as a less-hookup-focused Grindr, Goose is an invite-only space for gay men. The problem is the people promoting it don’t seem real.

AI.summary: Are you worried your AI chatbot is trying to build a bomb or leak personal information about you? There’s a website for that.

AI.title: Anthropic Added a New Security Measure to Get Back Into the Trump Administration’s Good Graces
AI.summary: The government has removed restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models—but there were strings attached.

AI.title: Claude Helped a Hacker Find a Way to Issue Tickets to Almost Every US Music Festival
AI.summary: A researcher found that using Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.7, he could break into the website of Front Gate—used by every festival from Lollapalooza to Bonnaroo—and freely issue any ticket he chose.

游戏.title: Onimusha: Way of the Sword Release Date Moved Forward
游戏.summary: Capcom has announced that Onimusha: Way of the Sword, the upcoming action-adventure sequel for PC, PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and Nintendo Switch 2, will now be released earlier than previously guided: it will be available on September 4 rather than September 25.

游戏.title: Marvel Refused to Tell Sadie Sink About Her Spider-Man: Brand New Day Character Until Filming Started

游戏.summary: Love and Deepspace fans are holding memorial services for Valko after Infold, the game’s developer, pulled the plug on the wolfy love interest mere days before his debut.

游戏.title: 'We Are Deeply Saddened' - Games Retailers and Historians Respond to PlayStation Abandoning Physical Media

游戏.title: Next Metroid Game for Switch 2 Reportedly Leaked in Age Rating From Brazilian Government

科技.summary: Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs, while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.

科技.summary: Cloudflare is giving AI companies until September 15 to separate web crawlers used for search from those used for AI training and agents, or risk being blocked by default on many publisher sites.
